name: ioe-v3-tail
description: IOE v3 post-review tail: fold-in -> triage -> reports -> merge. Run by the outer skill when the main ioe-v3 flow blocked at review-gate and the user has resolved the blockers (continue/fix/override/reclassify). NOT for the happy path — the main flow runs its own tail when review-gate passes.

worktree-path.description: Absolute path to the existing worktree

findings-json.description: Out-of-scope findings (JSON array string) from the review summary

in-scope-fixes-json.description: In-scope fold-in fixes (JSON array string) from the review summary

in-scope-fixes-count.description: Numeric count of in-scope fixes (for when guards)

override-note.description: Free-text note if the user overrode or reclassified blockers; shown to downstream agents

phases.task:
Confirm whether the fold-in fixes introduced any new merge_blockers. If any, end with 'VERDICT: BLOCK' and reasons; otherwise 'VERDICT: PASS'.

{steps.fold-in-verify.output}

Merge conflicts detected while rebasing {args.branch} onto {args.base}.

Conflicting files:
{steps.merge.json.conflicting_files}

Resolve the conflicts in the worktree ({args.worktree-path}), stage them with `git add`, then Approve to continue. Reject = abort this merge (leave the worktree as-is).
